value.found_quote: If you want Codex to review every pull request automatically, turn on **Automatic reviews** in [Codex settings](https://chatgpt.com/codex/settings/code-review). Codex will post a review whenever someone opens a new PR for review, without needing an `@codex review` comment.
value.rationale: The page describes Codex code review's "Enable automatic reviews" feature, which automatically reviews every pull request when turned on. This is presented as a currently available feature with setup instructions.
